node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"ապաշխարու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104238749","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104238749","n":"9"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-052a"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"},"V1294":{"lit":"ապաշխարու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104429815","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104429815","n":"7"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9122 copy"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"},"M8375":{"lit":"ա<lb xml:id=\"l104032173\" facs=\"#z104032173\" n=\"18\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>պաշխարութ<abbr>բ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104032172","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104032172","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8375.0049"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"},"M6712":{"lit":"ապաշխա<lb xml:id=\"l104390868\" facs=\"#z104390868\" n=\"2\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104390867","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104390867","n":"1"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-136a"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"},"M7227":{"lit":"ապաշխ<lb xml:id=\"l103964492\" facs=\"#z103964492\" n=\"5\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>արութ<abbr>բ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103964491","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103964491","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-056b"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"},"V1108":{"lit":"ապաշխարու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104429815","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104429815","n":"7"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9122 copy"},"n":"ապաշխարութբ"}}
